name: Approve documents with Discord and PostgreSQL hands-free

parameters.formTitle: Approve documents with Discord and PostgreSQL hands-free

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO candidate_log (candidateId, email, role, logged_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, NOW());

parameters.content:
### New Candidate Form Submission

Serves an n8n-hosted form (Email, Role, Stage). Each submission becomes one execution.

Next: Route by Work Type

### Route by Work Type

Routes each item to one of 3 lanes: auto-approve, needs-review + fallback.

Ports: ①→ Process 'auto-approve' → PostgreSQL · ②→ Fast-Track 'needs-review' + Alert · ③→ Hold Unknown Types (DLQ)

### Process 'auto-approve' → PostgreSQL

postgres — `executeQuery` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Postgres connection

### Fast-Track 'needs-review' + Alert

discord — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Discord webhook URL

### Hold Unknown Types (DLQ)

postgres — `executeQuery` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Postgres connection

### Merge Routed Work

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Stamp Processing Time

### Stamp Processing Time

Stamps `processedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Sort Candidates Newest First

### Sort Candidates Newest First

Orders items (newest first) so limits and digests pick the most relevant records.

# Approve documents with Discord and PostgreSQL hands-free

**Pattern:** Approval Workflow · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Form

## What it does
Approve documents with Discord and PostgreSQL hands-free. It starts from a hosted form submission.

## Why it exists
Manual screening is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
New Candidate Form Submission → Route by Work Type → Process 'auto-approve' → PostgreSQL → Merge Routed Work → Stamp Processing Time → Sort Candidates Newest First

## Use it for
- Teams that want to approval workflow without manual effort
- Anyone automating screening in human resources
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Scales without extra headcount
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Discord webhook URL; Postgres connection.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your screening process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
